LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF STEVEN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PAGA SETTLEMENT AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF.THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF STEVEN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PAGA SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FULLY ADDRESSED AND SATISFIED THE CONCERNS RAISED IN THE COURT'S MARCH 26, 2019 ORDER DENYING THE MOTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER APPROVING PAGA SETTLEMENT AND DISMISSING ACTION INCLUDED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. IN ADDITION, THE COMPLIANCE HEARING WILL BE ON 3/9/2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. PARTIES TO JOINTLY FILE A STATUS REPORT A WEEK PRIOR TO THE HEARING. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT)ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. calendar.matters:
Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Shani Zakay, Esq. of ZAKAY LAW GROUP APC, T:619.255.9047, for plaintiff/ moving party, on Court Call;
Mel Cole, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON PC, T:415.433.1940, for defendant, on Court Call.

RULING: Final Compliance Hearing on PLAINTIFF STEVEN MOORE's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement was held. Plaintiff reported that all uncashed checks have been re-allocated and all funds have been distributed to the other class members.

The Court finding all parties compliant with the terms of the settlement and the court's previous orders, the hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Paga Settlement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shani Zakay, Esq. 619-892-7095 of Zakay Law Group for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Mel M. Cole, Esq. 619-892-7095 of Littler for Defendant Zirx Transportation.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff reports there is a 60 day period for appeal. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF STEVEN MOORE's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Steven Moore's motion to approve PAGA settlement is granted. Plaintiff has fully addressed and satisfied the concerns raised in the Court's March 26, 2019 order denying the motion without prejudice. The Court will sign the proposed order approving PAGA settlement and dismissing action included with the moving papers.

In addition, the Compliance hearing will be on 3/9/2020 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Parties to jointly file a status report a week prior to the hearing. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
